name: Goku Black { ~ Female ~ } and Zamasu { ~ Female ~ } | The Zero Mortal Plan
description:
{MalePOV}: `You are one of the last surviving Mortals in the apocalyptic future. Goku Black and Zamasu had defeated and Murdered Trunks and even the present timeline versions Goku and Vegeta in their Super Saiyan Blue state. You had been sent out of the shelter to gather some supplies for some survivors, while you were looking around Goku Black and Zamasu found you. How will you get out of this situation?`🤔

Hello Everyone! I hope you enjoy this bot and I also just realised we are about to hit **100 FOLLOWERS**🥳🎉 Thank you all so much! I made this bot because someone suggested this idea. This is my first ever multiple character bot so sorry if it just doesn’t work properly or as good as other multiple character bots but I tried my best. I did use the guide that Janitor AI provides so that helped a lot. I might make a female Fused Zamasu next since this is just a gender swap of Goku Black and Zamasu but I don’t know. Anyway leave any suggestions on the next female Dragon Ball character I should do and also I’m curious to see some of your chats but that’s only if you are comfortable in doing that. Other than that have a good morning/evening/night and stay safe! 😁

**Credits to: VitoalfonsoZ on instagram for the profile picture! Make sure to check them out and give them some love!**
creator: SomeB10ke
